tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows elevated HbA1c, indicating impaired glucose control or possible diabetes, and significantly increased total cholesterol and LDL cholesterol, suggesting high cardiovascular risk. Other parameters, including kidney function, electrolytes, and triglycerides, are within normal limits. Recommend further evaluation and management of glycemic control and lipid profile to reduce long-term complications.

display.value: Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus

text.div: Provider Organization: KfH-Nierenzentrum am Klinikum Freising
